title: Situation Report — Gujarat flood: emulsifier supply secured
highlights: Monsoon flooding took Northwind's sole-source emulsifier plant (Vadodara, Gujarat) offline; estimated 21-day disruption.
Critical exposure: Trailpoint Granola Bar — 9 days of cover, $460,000 at risk; Vela Sparkling Botanicals on watch (18 days of cover).
Re-sourced to Jurong Fine Ingredients (Singapore) under contingent PO po-2026-0042: 12,000 kg at $4.85/kg, 3,000 kg by air arriving 2026-06-17.
Supplier confirmed by call; Verifier confirms the gap is closed with 2 days of margin. Residual risk: medium (single qualified alternate).
